Package declaration.description: Declare the package name (first line of every .luc file)

Use import with alias.description: Import a module with a local alias

Exported re-import.description: Re-export items from another module as part of this package's public API

Const declaration.description: Compile-time constant — must be a literal or constant expression

Function declaration.description: Function with a return value. Use -> to separate params from return type.

Function declaration — no return.description: Void function — omit -> entirely when there is no return value

Function declaration — nullable return.description: Function that may return nil — ? suffix on the return type

Nullable function binding.description: Variable holding a nullable function — qualifier is ~nullable on the binding

Async function declaration.description: Async function — ~async qualifier before the first parameter group. Call site must use await.

Curried function — two groups.description: Curried function with two parameter groups. Each () group is one call step.

Generic function.description: Generic function — type parameter immediately after the function name

Generic function with constraint.description: Generic function with trait constraint: T : Trait

Anonymous function.description: Anonymous function expression — no qualifiers on the value itself

Anonymous function — no return.description: Anonymous function with no return value

Anonymous function — curried.description: Curried anonymous function — multiple parameter groups

Struct with default field values.description: Struct with a default field value: field type = expr

Struct literal.description: Struct literal — always uses = for field initialisation, never :

Enum declaration.description: Named integer-backed enum — variants accessed as EnumName.Variant

Enum with explicit values.description: Enum with explicit integer values — useful for bitmasks (Vulkan flags)

Trait declaration.description: Trait — pure method signatures, no bodies, no fields

Type alias.description: Type alias — does not create a new nominal type

Type alias — function type.description: Type alias for a function type

Type alias — async function type.description: Type alias for an async function type — qualifier is part of the type

Impl block.description: Private impl block — methods callable only within the file

Public impl block.description: Package-public impl block — methods callable within the package

Exported impl block.description: World-public impl block — methods callable externally

Impl with trait conformance.description: Impl block declaring trait conformance: impl Type : Trait { ... }

Generic impl block.description: Generic impl block — type parameter immediately after the struct name

Impl method — with return.description: Impl method with a return type

Impl method — async.description: Async impl method — ~async qualifier before the parameter group

From conversion block.description: From block — defines implicit conversions to TargetType. Entry: (src SourceType) -> TargetType = { ... }

From entry.description: Single from conversion entry inside a from block

If expression (inline).description: Inline if expression — if cond ?? trueVal else falseVal. Both branches required.

Match expression.description: Match expression — arms use =>, default arm is required and must be last

Match — multiple patterns per arm.description: Match arm with multiple comma-separated patterns

Match — range pattern.description: Match with inclusive (..) and exclusive (..<) range patterns

Match — type dispatch.description: Match with type patterns — v is Type

Match — bind with guard.description: Match with bind pattern and guard: n if condition => result

Match — struct destructuring.description: Match with struct destructuring pattern: Type { field: subPattern }

Switch statement.description: Switch statement — no fallthrough, for statement-oriented dispatch

Switch — multiple values per case.description: Switch with multiple values and range per case

For range loop (inclusive).description: For loop over inclusive range — 0..n includes both endpoints

For range loop (exclusive).description: For loop over exclusive range — 0..<n excludes n

For range loop (with step).description: For loop with explicit step: start..end..step

For range loop (typed iterator).description: For loop with explicit iterator type annotation

While loop.description: While loop — condition checked before each iteration

Do-while loop.description: Do-while loop — body executes at least once

Await expression.description: Await an async call — only valid inside a ~async function body

Async function call.description: Call an ~async function and store the result

Nil fallback (??).description: Nil-coalescing fallback — returns RHS when LHS is nil

Nullable chain.description: Nullable chain — ?. steps must be terminated with ??

Nil guard.description: Guard against nil before using a nullable value

Pipeline step — argument pack.description: Argument pack step in a pipeline — ! means upstream is injected as first arg

Pipeline step — method.description: Impl method reference as a pipeline step — Type:method

Composition.description: Compile-time function composition +> — output type of left must match input of right

Main function.description: Program entry point — must be export const, must return int

Main function — with args.description: Program entry point with command-line arguments

AOT main.description: AOT main — ahead-of-time compilation. @aot and @jit are mutually exclusive.

JIT main.description: JIT main — just-in-time compilation via LLVM. @aot and @jit are mutually exclusive.

Extern declaration — function.description: Extern C/OS/Vulkan FFI function — requires const, no body

Extern declaration — with calling conven.description: Extern function with explicit calling convention

Deprecated attribute.description: @deprecated attribute — emits a warning at every use site

Packed struct attribute.description: @packed struct — removes padding, all fields byte-adjacent (useful for Vulkan layouts)

Sizeof intrinsic.description: #sizeof(T) — compile-time byte size of type T, returns uint64

Alignof intrinsic.description: #alignof(T) — compile-time alignment of type T, returns uint64

Sqrt intrinsic.description: #sqrt(x) — hardware-accelerated square root; x must be float or double

Memcpy intrinsic.description: #memcpy(dst, src, len) — copy bytes, regions must not overlap

Memset intrinsic.description: #memset(dst, value, len) — fill bytes with value

RefToPtr intrinsic.description: #refToPtr(ref) — convert safe reference back to raw pointer: &T → *T

PtrOffset intrinsic.description: #ptrOffset(ptr, n) — pointer arithmetic, returns ptr + n elements

Bitcast intrinsic.description: #bitcast(T, x) — reinterpret bits of x as type T; sizes must match

Fma intrinsic.description: #fma(a, b, c) — fused multiply-add: (a * b) + c, single rounding

Min intrinsic.description: #min(a, b) — minimum of two values; both must be the same type

Max intrinsic.description: #max(a, b) — maximum of two values; both must be the same type

Array — fixed.description: Fixed-size array: [N]T — stack-allocated, size is part of the type

Array — slice.description: Slice: []T — non-owning fat-pointer view (ptr + len + cap)

Slice expression (inclusive).description: Inclusive slice — arr[start..end] includes both start and end

Multiple assignment — declaration.description: Multi-variable declaration — every variable needs its own type annotation

Multiple assignment — reassignment.description: Multi-assignment to existing variables — RHS must be a single expression
